text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega and Narita Top Road are visiting a
studio to take part in a photo shoot for a
magazine.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, she looks a little stern... I'm sorry, but
could we stop and pick this back up another day?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Sure.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ayabe! Nice work.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...I'm sorry. This was supposed to be your photo
shoot, too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
It's fine! I'm always super nervous and tense, I
would've ended up with the same results!
choice_data_list: Want to go somewhere to clear your head?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Oh! I know somewhere nice!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
This art museum is currently holding an
astrophotography exhibition! I was just about to
tell you about it, Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I think it'd be a great way to lift your mood!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
It's so beautiful. Was this taken in the mountains?
Just through the photo I can tell how clear the air
is.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It just keeps going on and on...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. It's, like, so immersive. Just looking at it
feels like it's cleansing my spirit!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. That's probably the feeling they wanted to
convey.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
They wanted to share how the stars made them
feel... with someone...

I'm delighted... but also a little embarrassed you
were able to read into it so deeply.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Oh! You must be the person who took the photo!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me for butting in to your conversation. I
just didn't imagine I'd be able to share the
emotion from that moment with someone else...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's a really good photo. It shows your true skill.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Even so, I'm happy that you were able to feel the
emotion inside. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Emotion...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(So that's what drew me in... and that's why it left
such an impression.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Ah, right... That's what's important for a photo...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, Admire Vega tackles her
photo shoot once more.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Great! Much better! Let's take one more.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sure.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(It's not enough to just be present... I have to put
emotion in.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (In that case, the thing I want to convey is...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(My determination to keep running... and become
stronger.)

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
All right, that's a wrap! I think these photos will
turn out nicely!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
You were so cool, Ayabe! That last shot was
really intense!
choice_data_list: You improved a lot from last time.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't say that.
choice_data_list: I can't wait to see the final photos.
I can't wait to see the final photos.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't say that.
choice_data_list: I can't wait to see the final photos.
I can't wait to see the final photos.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's a different conversation.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: No! You'd totally make a great model, Ayabe!
choice_data_list: Want to give it a try?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Not a chance.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I know! I want everyone to see them. What if we
go hand them out?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Let's not do that.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I prefer to let it run its natural course.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Okay... That's fair!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: In fact, that way is definitely more like you!
